forecast-period.text: Clear. Light winds.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower about the southern Fleurieu Peninsula, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of fog in the morning, mainly on the eastern slopes. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog on the eastern slopes. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 15.
Clear. Light winds.
Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog in the south. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Mostly sunny. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Mostly sunny. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h turning northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the west, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Medium chance of showers, most likely in the afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog and frost in the morning. Slight chance of a shower in the afternoon and evening. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Keith. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog near the eastern border. Medium chance of showers in the morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming southwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 1 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Clear. Light winds.
Areas of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 1 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Clear. Light winds.
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 2 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the west. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 15.
Clear. Light winds.
Patches of frost and the chance of fog in the morning. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 3 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the late afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 4 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds easterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 17.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog in the east. Slight chance of a shower in the east, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 11 and 17.
Mostly clear. Light winds.

Partly cloudy. The chance of fog and frost on and east of the ranges in the morning. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day. Overnight temperatures falling to between 2 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching between 12 and 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the evening. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the morning. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower on and east of the ranges, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 13 and 18.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Medium chance of showers west of Ceduna, slight chance elsewhere. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 11 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog south of Streaky Bay. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the middle of the day then becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 18.

The chance of morning fog. Sunny afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light during the afternoon then becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower west of Nullarbor, most likely in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 19.
Mostly clear. Light winds.
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. The chance of morning fog. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming east to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day then becoming light during the afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Clear. Light winds.
The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

The chance of morning fog. Mostly sunny afternoon. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds becoming northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.
Partly cloudy. Light winds.

Cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Coober Pedy, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming easterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 10 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers south of Woomera, near zero chance elsewhere. Light winds becoming east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending east to southeasterly in the early afternoon. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 7 with daytime temperatures reaching around 16.

Sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Woomera. Areas of morning frost north of Marla. Light winds becoming northeast to southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h during the day. Overnight temperatures falling to around 5 with daytime temperatures reaching around 17.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower in the far west, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h tending north to northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning. Overnight temperatures falling to around 6 with daytime temperatures reaching around 18.
Mostly clear. Winds southeasterly 15 to 20 km/h.

Mostly sunny. Patches of frost and the chance of fog south of Yunta in the morning. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 3 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 20.
Sun protection 11:10am to 1:20pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Slight chance of a shower about the Gammon Ranges in the evening. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds southeasterly 20 to 30 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 4 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 20.

Mostly sunny. The chance of morning fog south of Yunta. Medium chance of showers south of Leigh Creek, most likely in the morning. Near zero chance of rain elsewhere. Winds south to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 5 and 8 with daytime temperatures reaching between 15 and 21.

Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower south of Leigh Creek, near zero chance elsewhere. Winds east to southeasterly 15 to 25 km/h. Overnight temperatures falling to between 6 and 9 with daytime temperatures reaching between 16 and 22.
